name: earl-marketplace
description: Earl's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: hood-2-coast
plugins.description: Skills for training for and running the Hood To Coast / Portland To Coast relay — daily training plans, leg/course lookup, packing, race rules, and team/van logistics. Grounded in the bundled 2026 HTC Handbook and a per-runner + per-team config saved in the runner's Obsidian vault.
